name: Arrest
description: Declarative, type-safe HTTP client with schema validation using Pydantic. Supports retries, exception handling, and OpenAPI-based code generation.

name: Wandern
description: CLI tool for managing database migrations with versioned SQL scripts and LLM-assisted revision generation.

name: Schnell
description: Single-threaded HTTP server implemented in Rust with declarative routing and custom response builders.

name: Wallpappr
description: Cross-platform desktop application for managing and setting wallpapers.

name: OPWM
description: Offline Password Manager - a dockerized offline application for managing password credentials.

name: Fermit
description: A policy-as-code library to write AuthZ policies in plain Python.
